title: Ssizzle Velvety Flaky Beef Fillet Robata-Grilled
description: A floral, velvety American dish featuring beef fillet, knead for tenderizing and sugar-free-friendly. Vessel: Robata Grill.
instructions: Preheat Robata Grill to medium-high heat.
Pat dry beef fillet with paper towels and season it with salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and herbs.
Mix Knead into a paste with olive oil until well combined.
Spread the knead mixture over the beef fillet on both sides.
Place seasoned fillets on the preheated Robata Grill.
Cook for about 5 minutes per side or until desired doneness, basting occasionally with the vinegar.
Let rest for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
